ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event bin */,
  "bin_range" TEXT /* Range of values for the bin */,
  "total_samples" INTEGER /* Total number of samples in the bin */,
  "event_count" INTEGER /* Count of events recorded in the bin */,
  "non_event_count" INTEGER /* Count of non-events recorded in the bin */,
  "event_rate" REAL /* Event rate as a percentage */,
  "population_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population represented by the bin */,
  "cumulative_event_pct" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of events up to this bin */,
  "cumulative_non_event_pct" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of non-events up to this bin */,
  "ks_statistic" REAL /* Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistic for the bin */,
  "cap_rate" REAL /* Capture rate for the bin */,
  "cumulative_event_rate" REAL /* Cumulative event rate up to this bin */,
  "demographic_distribution" TEXT /* Demographic distribution of the population in the bin */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the population in the bin */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the bin data is relevant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the event rate */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic entry */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event bin */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "median" REAL /* Median of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of event occurrences */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of event occurrences */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "quartiles" TEXT /* Quartiles of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of event occurrences in the bin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES event_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event bin being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES event_bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator performing the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the administrative action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was recorded */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of administrative action (create, update, delete) */,
  "affected_bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin affected by the action */,
  "affected_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the action */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event bin */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (PDF, Excel) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES event_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "import_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the imported file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the imported file (CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file in bytes */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (success, failed) */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the import */,
  "imported_bin_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the bins created or updated by the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (system, user) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (high, medium, low) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification expires */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
